derivation_steps.description: Parsed situation.md to identify named actors, organisations, and their strategic roles

extracted_entities.role_signal: acquirer and enterprise AI platform vendor — primary strategic actor
master data management and entity resolution acquisition target
pre-existing BDC alliance partner and data lake ecosystem amplifier
German SAP user group providing negative adoption signal via research (83% unfamiliarity)
competing enterprise AI data platform — inferred competitive threat
competing unified analytics and data integration platform

derivation_steps.description: Built SAP SE strategic actor profile from situation document and known corporate context

career_trajectory.source: synthesised from known SAP corporate history and situation document context

key_experiences.source: major acquisition events and product launches cited in situation document and known history

strategic_style.decision_style.value: acquisition-led platform expansion with ecosystem alliances
strategic_style.decision_style.source: inferred from BDC Databricks partnership + Reltio acquisition pattern

strategic_style.value_proposition.value: unified enterprise AI platform combining SAP and non-SAP data for business AI
strategic_style.value_proposition.source: direct quote from Muhammad Alam (SAP board exec)

derivation_steps.description: Derived influence relationships between actors based on situation signals and structural logic

influences_derived.derivation_basis: acquisition — Reltio's entity resolution engine transfers to SAP's product portfolio
pre-existing BDC alliance creates distribution and co-sell leverage for SAP
DSAG research data (83% BDC unfamiliarity) acts as a constraint signal on SAP's go-to-market

derivation_steps.description: Validated actor ontology against OntologyValidationIssue schema requirements
checks_performed: actors list present and non-empty: PASS
at least one StrategicActor (type=StrategicActor) present: PASS
StrategicActor profile.background_facts contains all required fields: PASS
background_facts.birth_year is integer or null: PASS
background_facts.education, career_trajectory, key_experiences are string arrays: PASS
